message:
refactor(db): scope DB connections in blocks to replace explicit drops, add clippy allows

Replace manual `drop(conn)` calls in release_reservations and
release_expired_reservations with block-scoped connections that drop
naturally. Adds clippy::too_many_lines and too_many_arguments allows
for existing long functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3789,6 +3789,7 @@ fn map_planned_rows(rows: Vec<sqlmodel_core::Row>, doc_kind: DocKind) -> Vec<Sea
     }
 }
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
 async fn execute_sql_plan_search(
     cx: &Cx,
     pool: &DbPool,
